items.name: Master Key
items.description: A heavy brass key on a velvet ribbon. Vivian left it for you at the concierge desk. It opens the main auditorium doors.

items.name: 1928 Playbill
items.description: The playbill from the final performance of 'The Crimson Veil' — October 31, 1928. Cast list: Margaux Fontaine as Lady Ashford. Understudy: Cecilia Drake.

items.name: Effects Manual
items.description: The Monarch Theatre Special Effects Manual, 1925. Detailed diagrams of fog machines, trapdoors, hidden passages, and lighting systems built into the original theater.

items.name: Margaux's Diary
items.description: A leather diary with 'M.F.' embossed in gold. The final entries describe feeling ill after tea, suspecting someone, and writing: 'If I do not survive the final curtain, look to the one who stands in the wings.'

items.name: Annotated Script
items.description: The original script of 'The Crimson Veil' with coded margin notes in red ink. The circled letters throughout the stage directions seem to spell something.

items.name: Poisoned Teacup
items.description: Ashworth's porcelain teacup with dried residue at the bottom. Whatever made him ill, the evidence is in this cup.

items.name: Basement Key
items.description: A heavy iron key found hidden behind the backstage lighting panel. It fits the basement door.

items.name: Edwin's Notebook
items.description: A leather notebook labeled 'The Ghost Project — E.H.' Contains years of research into Margaux's death, diagrams of the hidden passage system, and a detailed plan to stage hauntings.

items.name: Remote Control
items.description: A modified remote control system that can trigger fog machines, stage lights, and the trapdoor mechanism from the basement. One-person ghost operation.

items.name: Cecilia's Letters
items.description: Correspondence between Cecilia Drake and a pharmacist, dated October 1928. She ordered the same compound found in the prop goblet. This is proof Margaux was murdered.

items.name: Margaux's Locket
items.description: A gold locket found in the trunk. Inside: a photo of young Vivian as a child, and an inscription — 'To my little star. One day you'll shine brighter than all of us. — Margaux.'

items.name: Magnifying Glass
items.description: A silver-handled magnifying glass from the concierge desk. Useful for examining fine details.
